title: verbascum × rhodium
intro: Verbascum × rhodium, a hybrid of the Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum phoeniceum species, is a flowering plant known for its large, showy flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × rhodium include its ability to soothe irritated mucous membranes, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Verbascum × rhodium is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that promote respiratory health and relaxation.
